tweets.text:
He's no Clint Eastwood!

A 75 year old man was found to be transporting an estimated $455k worth of cocaine and ketamine into the United States.

Thankfully, our officers at the Laredo Port of Entry stopped this mule!

Read More: https://t.co/2JZizI5S9S
tweets.text_resolved:

tweets.text:
Today we celebrate 102 years of the US Border Patrol and the legacy of service, sacrifice, and security it represents.

For more than a century, USBP agents have answered the call, adapting to evolving threats while protecting our nation and the American people. With more than 21,000 agents across 20 sectors, their commitment to the mission is unwavering.

Happy 102nd Birthday, USBP. #HonorFirst

tweets.text:
The FIFA World Cup brings fans from around the world together and is a time to remember that protecting kids on and off the soccer field takes all of us.

Through @Know2Protect, @DHSgov is raising awareness and equipping fans, families and communities to help prevent and report online child exploitation. 

Learn more on the new K2P #FIFA World Cup page at https://t.co/WwqigFW4wE. ⚽ 

#WeAre26 #USHostsTheWorld #Know2Protect
